sub: Turn a real-life goal or habit into a quest.
title: Title
descriptionPlaceholder: Add a note to your future self
setTimeHint: Pin this activity to a specific time of day.
setTimeA11y: Set a specific time for this activity
rateHint: A quick “how did it go?” after each focus session — works for any habit, and powers your insights.
rateA11y: Ask for a 1 to 5 rating after completing this habit
whyPlaceholder: e.g. so I feel calmer and more focused
contributesHint: Completing this habit will also power the projects you pick.
dupBody: You already have “{{title}}”. It repeats every day, so you don't need to add it again.

library.title: Habit Library
library.sub: Pick from curated habits — no AI needed.
library.pickerSub: Tap an idea to use it.
library.pickerSubGoal: Pick a goal, then tap ideas to file them straight into it.
